old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-59bp","title":"P2: Inconsistent rxMode access in DispatchMessage for continuous RX","description":"RX_PACKET always sets rxMode=false even for continuous mode (timeout=0xFFFFFF). This breaks multiple-packet RX in continuous mode. The one-shot RX contract needs rxOneShot flag to only clear rxMode on packet for one-shot SetRx/PollRx (r7h4.6). Add rxOneShot bool, set in SendRxEnter based on timeout, condition the rxMode=false in DispatchMessage and RX_TIMEOUT. Document contract in comments. Use stateLock consistently. Tagged codereview.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:57:08.765215176Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T18:57:08.765215176Z","labels":["codereview"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-59bp","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-r7h4.13.1","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:57:08.91423776Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Fixed with rxOneShot for one-shot/continuous distinction and consistent stateLock usage in RX path
